text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahh! Captain Golshi is back and ready for action!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A voyage to the hidden lands beyond the seven
seas was just what I needed to recharge my
batteries!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's too bad you weren't there to see the sun set
over the Great Golshi Ocean!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The location of the Great Golshi Ocean may
forever remain a mystery, but at least Gold Ship
seems fully refreshed.
